ModeEnum.description: Generation mode — quality uses the full model, fast is ~20% cheaper and quicker.
ModeEnum.title: ModeEnum

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the video. Reference inputs as @Image1, @Video1, @Audio1, etc.
examples: An octopus finds a football in the ocean and excitedly calls its octopus friends to come and play.
prompt.title: Prompt

images.description: Reference images (@Image1, @Image2, ...). JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 30 MB each, up to 9 images. Total files across all modalities must not exceed 12.
images.title: Images

videos.description: Reference videos (@Video1, @Video2, ...). MP4/MOV, up to 3 videos, combined 2-15 seconds, total under 50 MB. Each video ~480p to ~720p resolution.
videos.title: Videos

audios.description: Reference audio (@Audio1, @Audio2, ...). MP3/WAV, up to 3 files, combined duration up to 15 seconds, max 15 MB per file. Requires at least one reference image or video.
audios.title: Audios

mode.description: quality uses the full Seedance 2.0 model. fast is ~20% cheaper and quicker with slightly lower fidelity.

resolution.description: Video resolution. 480p for faster generation, 720p for balanced quality.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (4-15). Use auto to let the model decide based on the prompt.

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated video. Use auto to let the model decide.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio (sound effects, ambient, lip-synced speech). Cost is the same regardless.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Use None for random.
seed.title: Seed
